item.title: Bull Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Bull Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 7, 2026Bull SASis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for products and technologies branded by Bull and its subsidiaries, unless covered by the scope of another CNA as well as vulnerabilities in third-party software and hardware discovered by Bull and its subsidiaries that are not in another CNA’s scope.

item.title: The illumos project Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: The illumos project Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 7, 2026The illumos projectis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for theillumos-gate repositoryand related downstream distributions such asOpenIndiana,SmartOS, andOmniOS.

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on May 13 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on May 13 Now AvailablenewsJuly 14, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on May 13, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on June 10 Now Available
item.description: Minutes from CVE Board Teleconference Meeting on June 10 Now AvailablenewsJuly 14, 2026TheCVE Boardheld a teleconference meeting on June 10, 2026. Read themeeting minutes summary.

item.title: Tuxcare Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Tuxcare Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 14, 2026Tuxcare Inc.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities in products developed, maintained, and distributed by TuxCare, including TuxCare Extended Lifecycle Support (ELS) and TuxCare SecureChain for OSS.

item.title: HDS Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: HDS Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 14, 2026HDS a.s.is now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities in products developed, maintained, or distributed by HDS and vulnerabilities in third party components if they affect HDS products and HDS is responsible for their integration.

item.title: Register Now for “CVE and AI Vulnerability Discovery” Virtual Conference on July 30, 2026
item.description: Register Now for “CVE and AI Vulnerability Discovery” Virtual Conference on July 30, 2026blogBy CVE Program|July 14, 2026

item.title: AISLE Incorporated Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: AISLE Incorporated Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 21, 2026AISLE Incorporatedis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all AISLE products.

item.title: Scality SA Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Scality SA Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 21, 2026Scality SAis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for all Scality-branded software products developed, maintained, and distributed by Scality, including but not limited to Scality RING, Scality ARTESCA, and Autonomous Data Infrastructure (ADI) products. The scope includes all versions of these products currently under active support, as well as legacy versions unless otherwise specified in the Scality Vulnerability Disclosure Policy.

item.title: Tacit Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)
item.description: Tacit Added as CVE Numbering Authority (CNA)newsJuly 21, 2026Tacitis now aCVE Numbering Authority (CNA)for vulnerabilities affecting software products, services, or components referenced in Tacit platform by software publishers.
